I build things at the intersection of software and music.

View Projects Get in Touch

// about

I'm a CS student at Point Loma Nazarene University graduating in 2026, a Graphic Design minor and nearly four years of professional black-box QA experience on Microsoft Defender. I build things at the intersection of software and music — from vulnerability detection tools to royalty dashboards for independent artists.

When I'm not at a computer, I'm in the studio or at the skate park.

Software

  • Python
  • C / C++
  • TypeScript
  • Next.js
  • SQL
  • Git

QA / Testing

  • Black-box testing
  • Test case design
  • Bug reporting
  • Defender-scale systems

Design & Music

  • Graphic Design
  • UI/UX
  • Figma
  • DAW Production
  • Songwriting

// projects

Next.js · Supabase · PostgreSQL · Tailwind CSS →

Music Distributor SaaS

A full-stack music distribution platform that gets artists on Spotify, Apple Music, TikTok, and 150+ platforms worldwide — built by a musician, for musicians.

Solo Developer
Jekyll · JavaScript →

Portfolio Website

An interactive, game-inspired portfolio site with a fake system takeover intro sequence, VHS static effect, and scroll-driven landing page.

Solo Developer
Python · ML →

ML-Based Vulnerability Detection

A machine learning pipeline that detects code vulnerabilities using real-world training data from the OSSF Secure Coding Guide dataset.

Co-developer

// music
